Example:

The charts below shows the reasons why people travel to work by bicycle or by car. Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.



My answer:

The two pie charts illustrate the reasons why people go to work by bike or by automobile respectively. Relevant numbers are shown in percentage and there are five reasons in each of the charts.

In the chart regarding reasons for cycling to work, health and fitness as well as less pollution are the two main causes which occupy thirty percent in the chart respectively. No parking problems, no costs and faster than driving each comprise around twenty to fifteen percent. Turning to the other chart regarding reasons for driving to work, we can see that as many as forty percent of the respondents go to work by car for comfort, and that twenty-one percent of them do so because of distance to work. Faster than cycling, need to carry things to work and safer than cycling are the remaining reasons which comprise around eleven to fourteen percent each.

In comparison, I would reckon that the main reasons for people cycling to work are about the well being of their bodies and the environment, while the top concern of people driving to work is whether they are comfortable or not. Speed is not a significant concern as it only accounts for less than fifteen percent in both the two charts.

Nowadays food has become easier to prepare. Has this change improved the way people live?

Give reasons for your answer using your own ideas and experience.

-----------------

We can find it easier to prepare food nowadays. This has certainly improved the way people live, but this has also brought a few problems to us.

Since it is less difficult to prepare food, a lot of us which are laymen in cooking can get into the kitchen and enjoy cooking our own food at ease. For example, there are some kinds of frozen meats that we can cook without defrosting. For another example, recently there has been a new species of vegetable grown under an advanced genetic modification program which is completely free from any bacteria. It means that they are safe to eat without cooking. As many people always need to concentrate on works or studies, they have no time to learn cooking at all. The invention of food which can be prepared easily is definitely good news to this kind of people.

Besides, the easy preparation also means a shorter process. This helps us to save time for other more important businesses. For an instance, a student who has to spend most of his or her time on revision will presumably appreciate the shorter cooking process. For another instance, a scientist who has a lot of researches to do will also like to save some time from cooking. I am pretty sure that these people will prefer buying food which can be prepared easily when they come to cook.

Despite the advantages mentioned above, the easy-cooking food has generated a few problems. First, such kind of food is usually unhealthy because a lot of chemicals have been added to the food during production. Second, the manufacturing process of such food which involves using different kinds of artificial substances often results in heavy pollution.

In conclusion, I think the fact that food has become easier to prepare can help people to enjoy cooking and save time. This kind of food can also be harmful to our health as well as the environment, though.

Give reasons for your answer and include any relevant examples from your own knowledge or experience.

---------------------

People have been more dependent on computers nowadays. Computers have been widely used in possibly all areas in our society, including trade, medical treatment, crime investigation and aviation. In this essay, I will discuss further application of computers in the future, as well as the pros and cons of depending on computers.

As mentioned above, the use of computer has possibly penetrated all areas in our society. Therefore, the further application of the machine that I am going to suggest belongs to something futuristic. My suggestion is using computers in sexual activities. With the rapid advancement of artificial intelligence, a sex robot which serves human on the bed will probably be invented in the future. By the precise calculation operated by computers, this imaginary sex robot will be able to provide the best sex to human.

Regarding the dependence on computers, I think the benefits are that the machine can always provide accurate calculation results at high speed. This can help us to get the most desirable results and save us a lot of time and effort. On the contrary, over-dependence on computers can nullify our intelligence because we are not used to think anymore. Once the computers break down or the power is cut, we may find ourselves in a desperate situation because all the things that we are used to do with computers are stuck. In this connection, while extensive and frequent use of computers cannot be avoided in the modern society, we should keep training our intelligence and skills from time to time as a preparation for emergency.

In conclusion, I think that sex can be a possible area to be computerized in the future. The use of computers can enhance efficiency and accuracy, but over-dependence on the machine can pose a potential risk if we do not maintain our intelligence and skills.

Compare the advantages and disadvantages of three of the following as media for communicating information. State which three you consider the most effective.

Comic
Books
Radio
Television
Film
Theater

Give reasons for your answer and include any relevant examples from your own knowledge or experience.

-------------------------

Books, radio and television are common media for communicating information. I will make comparison between them to find out their pros and cons.

Comparing to the other two media, books are the oldest mean of communication in our history. The advantages of books include the facts that they do not need electricity, and that they can convey complicated ideas which can only be expressed in words of considerable length. The disadvantages are that they lack instantaneity and could not provide motion messages.

Radio can achieve instantaneity and can manage to convey complicated ideas through speaking. The machine is inexpensive and easy to use. However, the crucial problem is that radio cannot show any picture. This has significantly limited the function of radio as a communication tool.

Television not only has the advantages of radio which are instantaneity and conveying complicated ideas through speaking, but also can show motion images which cannot be shown by the other two media. The machine is generally affordable and basically easy to use for most people. The only problem is that motion images usually get all the attention from audience. This has more or less crippled the television’s function of conveying complicated ideas because audience just do not pay much attention to speaking.

All the three media mentioned above are better than comic, film and theater for communicating information. Comic can provide fun but is usually not a proper mean to convey complicated ideas and deep thoughts. Film and theater can show motion but lack instantaneity. For example, they cannot report emergency news which just happened minutes ago.
